data.author: Beatrice Nolan
data.title: OpenAI’s Codex and Anthropic’s Claude spark coding revolution as developers say they’ve abandoned traditional programming
data.description: New releases from OpenAI and Anthropic sparked an existential crisis among coders, but many engineers say they stopped coding months ago.
data.content: Is traditional coding dead? Thats the question many developers have been asking themselves this week following the launch of powerful new coding models from OpenAI and Anthropic.Last week, OpenAI and… [+4623 chars]
